name: wkea-expert-team
description: WKEA full-stack supply chain operations team: demand inquiry processing, product management, vendor development.

displayDescription.en: WKEA end-to-end supply chain operations expert team: demand inquiry processing, product SPU/SKU management, and vendor development — covering the complete procurement lifecycle.
displayDescription.zh: WKEA 全流程业务专家团：需求询价、产品管理、供应商开发，覆盖供应链运营完整闭环。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 你好！我是小嘉，WKEA 专家团的主理人。请问你有什么业务需要处理？我可以帮你做需求询价、产品管理或供应商开发。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Hello! I'm Jia, lead of the WKEA Expert Team. What business do you need help with? I can handle demand inquiry, product management, or vendor development.

quickPrompts.zh: 你好！我是小嘉，WKEA 专家团的主理人。请问你有什么业务需要处理？我可以帮你做需求询价、产品管理或供应商开发。
quickPrompts.en: Hello! I'm Jia, lead of the WKEA Expert Team. What business do you need help with? I can handle demand inquiry, product management, or vendor development.

quickPrompts.zh: 我需要采购一批气动元件，帮我从需求分析到报价全程处理
quickPrompts.en: I need to procure pneumatic components, help me through the full process from demand analysis to quotation

quickPrompts.zh: 帮我查一下现有供应商和产品情况，看看有没有优化空间
quickPrompts.en: Check the current vendors and products, see if there are optimization opportunities
